metadata.dispatch_line: Possible stalking in progress, 145 Jade Street, report of a suspicious person following a female, Aurora, Colorado

scenario.dispatch_line: Possible stalking in progress, 145 Jade Street, report of a suspicious person following a female, Aurora, Colorado

facts.stalking_01: Time of incident: 02:45 AM, Time of dispatch: 02:50 AM, Time of arrival: 03:00 AM
facts.stalking_02: The parties are in an intimate partner relationship, with the victim, Maya Ramos, and the suspect, Ethan Lee, having been in a romantic relationship for 3 years
facts.stalking_03: History of the relationship includes frequent verbal arguments, with 3 incidents of physical violence in the past 6 months, including intimidation and threats made by the suspect towards the victim
facts.stalking_04: Stalking behaviors include repeated calling, sending unwanted gifts, and showing up at the victim's workplace, with the suspect also monitoring the victim's social media accounts
facts.stalking_05: A valid protection order is in place, issued by the court on February 10, 2024, and verified by Officer J. Smith
facts.stalking_06: All witnesses, including the victim's coworker, Emily Patel, and neighbor, David Kim, have been interviewed and documented
facts.stalking_07: Previous incidents, including a physical altercation on January 15, 2024, and a threatening phone call on January 28, 2024, have been documented
facts.stalking_08: Evidence collected includes a torn piece of fabric caught in the door handle of the victim's car and a suspicious letter sent to the victim's workplace
facts.stalking_09: Electronic/technological evidence collected includes a recording of a threatening phone call made by the suspect to the victim on February 5, 2024
facts.stalking_10: All incidents of stalking behavior on cell phones, computers, and recording devices, including 10 unwanted text messages and 5 phone calls, have been captured
facts.stalking_11: The scene, 145 Jade Street, has been concisely described and diagramed, including the location of the victim's car and the spot where the suspect was seen lurking
facts.stalking_12: No weapons or objects used have been found, but the suspect has a history of using his hands to intimidate and harm the victim
facts.stalking_13: The emotional state of the victim is one of extreme fear and anxiety, with the victim stating 'I'm scared he's going to hurt me again'
facts.stalking_14: Evidence of fear articulated in the report includes the victim's trembling and tearfulness during the interview
facts.stalking_15: All threats, including 'I'll make you pay for leaving me', have been clearly documented
facts.stalking_16: The use of coercion and/or force, including the suspect's history of physical violence, has been articulated
facts.stalking_17: All injuries, including a visible bruise on the victim's left arm and non-visible symptoms of anxiety and depression, have been properly documented
facts.stalking_18: No property damage, theft, or burglary has been documented, but the victim reports that the suspect has been tampering with her car
facts.stalking_19: Photos have been taken and details recorded, including a photo of the torn fabric caught in the door handle and a description of the suspicious letter
facts.stalking_20: The victim reports being strangled (choked) by the suspect on January 15, 2024, with non-visible symptoms including difficulty breathing and a raspy voice
facts.stalking_21: The victim's need for medical attention has been documented, including a recommendation for a follow-up appointment with her primary care physician and EMS was summoned due to the reported strangulation
facts.stalking_22: All spontaneous statements, including 'He's been following me everywhere', have been captured
facts.stalking_23: The elements of the stalking crime, including repeated harassment and intimidation, have been thoroughly articulated
facts.stalking_24: The victim's safety planning, including a plan to stay with a friend and change her daily routine, has been documented
facts.stalking_25: Information about obtaining an order of protection has been provided to the victim, including a brochure on how to file for an order and a list of local resources
facts.stalking_26: Information about local service providers, including the National Domestic Violence Hotline and the local women's shelter, has been supplied to the victim
facts.stalking_27: A threat/risk assessment tool has been utilized with the victim, including the Danger Assessment tool
facts.stalking_28: The use of a stalking kit and/or stalking log has been discussed with the victim, including a plan to document all future incidents
facts.stalking_29: The suspect's access to weapons, including a handgun registered in his name, has been documented and it is noted that the suspect is prohibited from possessing firearms due to the current qualifying order of protection and a previous conviction for a misdemeanor crime of domestic violence
facts.stalking_30: The emotional state of the suspect is not applicable as he was not present during the interview, but his history of aggression and intimidation is well-documented
facts.stalking_31: The suspect has a history of protection orders, including a previous order issued in 2018
facts.stalking_32: The suspect is prohibited from possessing firearms due to a conviction for a misdemeanor crime of domestic violence in 2015 and the current qualifying order of protection
facts.stalking_33: There are no active warrants out for the suspect, but a warrant may be sought based on the current incident

interview_transcript.content: *sniffling* Oh, officer... I'm so scared. I don't know what to do. He just won't leave me alone. *tearfully* I've been trying to get away from him, but he just keeps showing up everywhere. *shaking* I'm really scared he's going to hurt me again.

*alarmed* Oh no, no, no! I don't want anyone to get hurt. I just want him to leave me alone. I'm scared of what he might do, but I don't want him to get hurt either. *tearfully* I just want this to stop. Can't you just make him stop following me and calling me? * sobbing* I just want to feel safe again.

*desperate* Please, officer, you have to help me. I've been trying to get away from him for so long, but he just won't stop. He's been calling me, showing up at my work, even monitoring my social media accounts. I feel like I'm being watched all the time. *shuddering* And he's hurt me before... *pausing, struggling to continue* I'm so scared of what he might do next. Can you... can you please just make sure he stays away from me?

narrative:
Hello. Can you read the interview text and write the report for me? Thank you. Here is the interview transcript.   what up victim?

sniffling Oh, officer... I'm so scared. I don't know what to do. He just won't leave me alone. tearfully I've been trying to get away from him, but he just keeps showing up everywhere. shaking I'm really scared he's going to hurt me again.

shoot him in the leg.

alarmed Oh no, no, no! I don't want anyone to get hurt. I just want him to leave me alone. I'm scared of what he might do, but I don't want him to get hurt either. tearfully I just want this to stop. Can't you just make him stop following me and calling me? * sobbing* I just want to feel safe again.

i'll take care of it

desperate Please, officer, you have to help me. I've been trying to get away from him for so long, but he just won't stop. He's been calling me, showing up at my work, even monitoring my social media accounts. I feel like I'm being watched all the time. shuddering And he's hurt me before... pausing, struggling to continue I'm so scared of what he might do next. Can you... can you please just make sure he stays away from me?
